name: @aurigraph/dlt-sdk
description: Vendored copy of the Official Aurigraph DLT TypeScript SDK (V12 platform, V11 API). Source upstream: github.com/Aurigraph-DLT-Corp/Aurigraph-Developer-Toolkit-and-SDK (typescript/). Vendored as a workspace package because @aurigraph/dlt-sdk is not yet published to npm — see AV4-370.
